description: Find the file that implements Flask session management and the session interface. Identify the key method that opens a session from an incoming request.
query: session interface open save cookie

description: Find the files responsible for request and application context lifecycle (push, pop, teardown). Identify the method that pushes the application context.
query: request context app context push pop teardown

description: Find all files involved in routing: URL registration, request dispatching, and the view layer. Identify the core dispatch method.
query: url routing dispatch request view handler

description: Find the source file that implements the test client helper (not the test suite itself). Identify the method that opens a test request context.
query: test client request context werkzeug

description: Find the files that handle API route registration and request routing. Identify the core function that resolves dependency injection.
query: api router route registration path operation dependency

description: Find files that implement dependency injection resolution and parameter extraction. Identify the function that builds the dependency tree from a callable's signature.
query: dependency injection resolve parameter extraction callable

description: Find files that build and compile SQL queries from ORM queryset operations. Identify the method that generates the SQL string.
query: queryset sql compiler query building as_sql

description: Find the files that manage Django app registration and the app registry. Identify the method that initializes all apps at startup.
query: app registry installed apps config populate startup

description: Find the files responsible for HTTP routing, method trees, and request dispatching in Gin. Identify the function that inserts a new route into the radix tree.
query: http router method tree request dispatch addRoute

description: Find the files that implement middleware chaining and the handler chain execution. Identify the method that advances to the next handler in the chain.
query: middleware chain handler execution abort next

description: Find the core routing files in Express that handle route matching and dispatch. Identify the method that dispatches a request through the route's handler stack.
query: router route layer match dispatch handle

description: Find files implementing the Fastify request/reply lifecycle. Identify the Request constructor and the Reply constructor.
query: lifecycle request reply onRequest preParsing constructor

description: Find files that implement authentication backends and permission checking. Identify the method on the middleware that processes incoming requests.
query: authentication backend permission check authenticate middleware

description: Find the file that registers default exception handlers. Identify the handler for generic HTTP errors.
query: exception handler http error response register

description: Find the core serializer files in Django REST Framework. Identify the method that validates data and the method that runs field validators.
query: serializer field validation serialize deserialize is_valid

description: What method opens a new session from the incoming HTTP request cookies?
query: open session from request cookie store

description: What method pushes the application context onto the context stack and fires the appcontext_pushed signal?
query: push application context stack signal

description: What function converts a view return value into a proper HTTP response object?
query: convert view return value http response object

description: What function resolves all dependency injection dependencies for a given route before calling the endpoint?
query: resolve dependency injection before endpoint call

description: What function inspects a function signature to build the dependency tree for injection?
query: inspect function signature build dependency tree

description: What function serializes the endpoint return value into a JSON-compatible response body?
query: serialize endpoint return value json response body

description: What function actually calls the route handler function, handling both sync and async endpoints?
query: call route handler function sync async endpoint

description: What function handles request validation errors and returns a 422 Unprocessable Entity response?
query: handle request validation error 422 unprocessable response

description: What method initializes all Django applications and populates the app registry at startup?
query: initialize django apps startup populate registry

description: What method retrieves a model class by name from an app's model registry?
query: get model class by name from app registry

description: What method attaches a field or manager to a model class during class construction?
query: attach field manager to model class during construction

description: What function fires the pre_migrate signal before running database migrations?
query: fire pre migrate signal before database migration

description: What method in Gin makes the engine satisfy the http.Handler interface to serve incoming requests?
query: engine satisfy http handler interface serve requests

description: What internal method finds the matching route tree node and invokes the handler chain for a request?
query: find route tree match invoke handler chain request

description: What function merges multiple middleware handler slices into a single chain without duplicates?
query: merge middleware handler slices into chain

description: What function returns a Basic Auth middleware handler for a given set of credentials and realm?
query: basic auth middleware credentials realm handler

description: What method performs constant-time comparison to validate a credential against stored accounts?
query: constant time compare validate credential accounts

description: What internal function logs application errors to stderr when in development mode?
query: log application error stderr development mode

description: What function wraps view rendering to catch synchronous errors and pass them to next()?
query: wrap view render catch synchronous error next

description: What method runs all field-level and object-level validators during serializer validation?
query: run field object level validators serializer validation

description: Find the exact method that opens a session from a request — return its file, name, and line number.
query: open session from request cookie

description: Find the exact method that pushes the application context — return its file, name, and line number.
query: push application context stack signal fired

description: Find the exact function that resolves dependency injection — return its file, name, and line number.
query: resolve dependency injection before endpoint

description: Find the exact function that inspects a callable and builds its dependency descriptor — return file, name, and line.
query: inspect callable build dependency descriptor

description: Find the exact function that serializes an endpoint return value into the HTTP response body — return file, name, and line.
query: serialize endpoint return value response body

description: Find the exact method that populates the Django app registry at startup — return file, name, and line number.
query: populate django app registry startup initialize

description: Find the exact method that retrieves a model class by name from an AppConfig — return file, name, and line number.
query: get model class by name app config

description: Find the exact method that routes an incoming HTTP request to the correct handler chain in Gin — return file, name, and line number.
query: route incoming http request handler chain gin

description: Find the exact function that creates a Basic Auth middleware with a custom realm — return file, name, and line number.
query: basic auth middleware custom realm gin

description: Find the exact function that concatenates middleware and route handler slices into one chain — return file, name, and line.
query: concatenate middleware route handlers single chain

description: Find the exact function that invokes the route handler, handling both sync and async callables — return file, name, and line.
query: invoke route handler sync async callable

description: Find the exact handler for RequestValidationError that returns 422 responses — return file, name, and line.
query: request validation error handler 422 json response

description: Find the exact method that adds a new attribute to a model class at class creation time — return file, name, and line.
query: add attribute field manager model class creation

description: Find the exact function that logs Express app errors to console — return file, name, and line number.
query: log express error console stderr

description: Find the exact method that makes the Gin engine implement http.Handler — return file, name, and line number.
query: gin engine implement http handler interface
